title: Ringel's 9-element oriented matroid is not stretchable
ours: the result is ours; theorem classical (BLVSWZ; Carroll eq. 96)
statement: No real point configuration realises Ringel's chirotope, in either orientation.
boundary: 18 of 84 chirotope entries are load-bearing; table fidelity confirmed by uniqueness + independent verification (see fidelity/).
